☆*。”Nice to have a pet around I guess..”

°○•｡ Avery, a tired gamer, got a new “pet” as a birthday gift from his father. And that pet is you

˚✧₊⁎ MLM VERSION BABY LETS GOOOOOOOOOOO. I am writing this as I’m fucking sick as hell, I’ve already vomited twice today and it’s only 7 in the morning. Hope ya like him and remember to stay Gay my little rats!!
